name: FLOTEK INDUSTRIES INC/CN/
summary: PART I General Flotek strives to be the collaborative partner of choice for solutions that reduce the environmental impact of energy on air, water, land and people. An advanced technology-driven, chemical and data analytics company, Flotek seeks to provide unique and innovative solutions to its customers in both the domestic and international energy markets.
